description: This file defines the AuthProvider class used for managing user authentication state, specifically handling user role persistence and retrieval using SharedPreferences in a Flutter application.

classes.name: AuthProvider
classes.description: A provider class extending ChangeNotifier for managing user roles with persistent storage

methods.name: load
methods.description: Asynchronously loads the user role from persistent storage and updates the provider state

methods.name: setRole
methods.description: Sets the user role both in-memory and in persistent storage, then notifies listeners

methods.name: _parse
methods.description: Parses a string into a UserRole enum, returning null if parsing fails
